inputs.description: Default synthetic large-context inputs bundled with the blueprint.

llm.agent_role: AI assistant for researching property deals and drafting opportunity rankings.
responsibilities: retrieve important historical facts from working memory
connect broker, lender, rent, insurance, and diligence signals
rank opportunities against the current snapshot
explain bid, discount, or watchlist decisions with source_refs

memory.compression_goal: replace full-history agent handoffs with a compact source-grounded decision packet while preserving older critical facts

metadata.customizable_for: Rental acquisitions, flipping pipelines, multifamily sourcing, market expansion, diligence review, and capital-allocation meetings.
metadata.problem_solved: Property deal review depends on older broker, lender, rent, insurance, and diligence details that are easy to lose in noisy pipelines.
metadata.target_users: Real-estate investors, acquisition analysts, property-tech teams, and diligence operators.
metadata.name: Property Deal Research Assistant
metadata.description: Reviews ZIP-code history, broker notes, financing constraints, and deal memory to rank property opportunities and explain which ones deserve attention.
metadata.llm_agent_role: AI assistant for researching property deals and drafting opportunity rankings.
metadata.agent_role: AI assistant for researching property deals and drafting opportunity rankings.
metadata.target_user: Real-estate investors, acquisition analysts, property-tech teams, and diligence operators.
metadata.simulation_type: Property opportunity research with deal-memory retrieval.

outputs.artifact_contract: Ranked property opportunities, source-grounded notes, and watchlist or bid recommendations for review.

inline_json.description: Load overrides from an inline JSON object.

input_file.description: Load JSON overrides from a local file path.

simulation.type: Property opportunity research with deal-memory retrieval.
